sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6973" key="a)namasxalisth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναμασχᾰλιστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μασχάλη</etym>) <sense id="n6973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoulder-strap,</tr_> an article of female dress, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0490.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philippid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
